name: stockyard-compliancelog
description: Tamper-proof audit logging for LLM interactions. Hash-chained entries, configurable retention, SOC2/HIPAA-ready export formats.

tools.name: compliancelog_stats
tools.description: Get audit log statistics: total entries, storage size, oldest/newest entry.

tools.name: compliancelog_search
tools.description: Search audit logs by date range, model, user, or project.

tools.name: compliancelog_verify
tools.description: Verify hash chain integrity. Detects tampering.

tools.name: compliancelog_export
tools.description: Export audit logs in compliance format.

tools.name: compliancelog_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the ComplianceLog proxy is running and healthy.
